title: Tilting pair over split-by-nilpotent extensions
journal: Journal of Algebra and Its Applications
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Ltd
abstract: Let [Formula: see text], [Formula: see text] be two finite dimensional algebras over a field [Formula: see text], such that [Formula: see text] is a split extension of A by the nilpotent bimodule [Formula: see text]. We mainly give necessary and sufficient conditions for a tilting pair [Formula: see text] such that [Formula: see text] or [Formula: see text] are tilting pairs. Also, we obtain a similar condition such that a Wakamatsu tilting pair [Formula: see text] in [Formula: see text]-mod can be a Wakamatsu tilting pair [Formula: see text] in [Formula: see text]-mod.
